name.description: The name of the resource (e.g., 'users' for UsersDataService)

path.description: The destination path for the data service (e.g., 'features/users/services' or 'core/services')

apiService.description: The name of the generated OpenAPI service to wrap (e.g., 'UsersApiService'). If not provided, will be inferred from the resource name.

apiPath.description: The import path to the generated API service

flat.description: When true, creates the service file directly in the specified path instead of creating a subdirectory

skipTests.description: When true, does not create a spec file
